name: FctsIdsGrpClsPlnVrblBnfPerdCntBal

text.value: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.XY12_TMP_Research; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.XY12_TMP_Notify; WITH base AS (SELECT GRP_CLS_PLN_VRBL_BNF_PERD.GRP_ID AS TRGT_GRP_ID, GRP_CLS_PLN_VRBL_BNF_PERD.CLS_ID AS TRGT_CLS_ID, GRP_CLS_PLN_VRBL_BNF_PERD.CLS_PLN_DTL_CLS_PLN_PROD_CAT_CD AS TRGT_CLS_PLN_DTL_CLS_PLN_PROD_CAT_CD, GRP_CLS_PLN_VRBL_BNF_PERD.CLS_PLN_ID AS TRGT_CLS_PLN_ID, GRP_CLS_PLN_VRBL_BNF_PERD.CLS_PLN_VRBL_BNF_PERD_EFF_DT_SK AS TRGT_CLS_PLN_VRBL_BNF_PERD_EFF_DT_SK, GRP_CLS_PLN_VRBL_BNF_PERD.SRC_SYS_CD_SK AS TRGT_SRC_SYS_CD_SK, Bal.GRP_ID, Bal.CLS_ID, Bal.CLS_PLN_DTL_CLS_PLN_PROD_CAT_CD, Bal.CLS_PLN_ID, Bal.CLS_PLN_VRBL_BNF_PERD_EFF_DT_SK, Bal.SRC_SYS_CD_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.GRP_CLS_PLN_VRBL_BNF_PERD GRP_CLS_PLN_VRBL_BNF_PERD FULL OUTER JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.B_GRP_CLS_PLN_VRBL_BNF_PERD Bal ON GRP_CLS_PLN_VRBL_BNF_PERD.GRP_ID = Bal.GRP_ID AND GRP_CLS_PLN_VRBL_BNF_PERD.CLS_ID = Bal.CLS_ID AND GRP_CLS_PLN_VRBL_BNF_PERD.CLS_PLN_DTL_CLS_PLN_PROD_CAT_CD = Bal.CLS_PLN_DTL_CLS_PLN_PROD_CAT_CD AND GRP_CLS_PLN_VRBL_BNF_PERD.CLS_PLN_ID = Bal.CLS_PLN_ID AND GRP_CLS_PLN_VRBL_BNF_PERD.CLS_PLN_VRBL_BNF_PERD_EFF_DT_SK = Bal.CLS_PLN_VRBL_BNF_PERD_EFF_DT_SK AND GRP_CLS_PLN_VRBL_BNF_PERD.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = Bal.SRC_SYS_CD_SK WHERE GRP_CLS_PLN_VRBL_BNF_PERD.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK >= @{pipeline().parameters.ExtrRunCycle}) SELECT TRGT_GRP_ID, TRGT_CLS_ID, TRGT_CLS_PLN_DTL_CLS_PLN_PROD_CAT_CD, TRGT_CLS_PLN_ID, TRGT_CLS_PLN_VRBL_BNF_PERD_EFF_DT_SK, TRGT_SRC_SYS_CD_SK INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.XY12_TMP_Research FROM base WHERE TRGT_CLS_ID IS NULL OR CLS_ID IS NULL OR TRGT_GRP_ID IS NULL OR GRP_ID IS NULL OR TRGT_CLS_PLN_ID IS NULL OR CLS_PLN_ID IS NULL OR TRGT_CLS_PLN_DTL_CLS_PLN_PROD_CAT_CD IS NULL OR CLS_PLN_DTL_CLS_PLN_PROD_CAT_CD IS NULL OR TRGT_SRC_SYS_CD_SK IS NULL OR SRC_SYS_CD_SK IS NULL; IF '@{pipeline().parameters.ToleranceCd}' = 'OUT' BEGIN SELECT 'ROW COUNT BALANCING FACETS - IDS GRP_CLS_PLN_VRBL_BNF_PERD OUT OF TOLERANCE' AS NOTIFICATION INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.XY12_TMP_Notify END ELSE BEGIN SELECT TOP 0 CAST('' AS VARCHAR(100)) AS NOTIFICATION INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.XY12_TMP_Notify END
